name: messages_create
description: Send an SMS message to one or more recipients. Returns a message object with delivery status per recipient.

parameters.name: originator
parameters.description: Sender name (max 11 alphanumeric chars) or phone number in international format.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: Array of recipient phone numbers in international format (e.g., 31612345678).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body of the SMS message. Max 1600 characters for concatenated SMS.

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: A client reference for tracking (max 256 chars).

parameters.name: validity
parameters.description: Message validity period in seconds. Max 259200 (72 hours).

parameters.name: scheduledDatetime
parameters.description: Schedule message for later delivery (ISO 8601 format).

body.body: Your verification code is 123456. It expires in 10 minutes.
Your verification code is 123456. It expires in 10 minutes.
